calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders the balance of the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-14-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-16-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Bob Balian, CSR #5220.

Gary A. Angel, Esq. appeared for planitiff Granite Excavation & Demolition, Inc., a California corporation.
Irwin o'Toole, Project Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Paris E. Royo, owner of defendant Royco Construction, was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
No Appearance by defendant Dinesh Maniar.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Far East National Bank, was filed on November 12, 2009.
Notice of Time and Placed of Trial was filed on May 27, 2009.
The parties reached a settlement as to defendant Royco Construction, which was placed on the record by Mr. Angel. A prove-up hearing as to defendant Dinesh Mania was heard by the Court.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Granit Excavation & Demoliton, Inc., a California corporation, and against defendant Dinesh Maniar as follows:

Principal - $184,227.00.
Interest - $27,634.05.
Attorney's Fees - $38,159.94.
Costs - Reserved.

Total - $250,020.99, offset by any payments by other defendants.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than December 15, 2009.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-14-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

Off Calendar Dec-04-2009 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Jul-01-2009 Continued To Dec-04-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 604

MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel James T. MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2009 Continued To Nov-19-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel, Defendant's Counsel James T. Graeb, and William Robinson, and Defendant in Propria Persona Royoco Construction a Sole Proprietorship, owned by Paris E. Royo for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered Defendant's Counsel James Graeb sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. Court ordered the OSC to Defendant's Counsel James Graeb re-set to 11/19/2009 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. The OSC as to all other parties and counsel is ordered off calendar and dissolved. Proceedings not reported. (212)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-09-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: James T. Graeb, Esq. Law Offices of James T. Graeb Motion to be Relieved as Counsel for Defendant Dinesh Maniar. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
